evals.expected_output: Use the sct-checker skill for this sct checker request and produce the documented result for example.com.
expectations: Selects sct-checker for requests matching its trigger description.
Uses the documented tool surface: cert_check_sct.
Keeps the response focused on verifying Signed Certificate Timestamps (SCTs) for Certificate Transparency compliance per CA/Browser Forum requirements.

evals.prompt: Handle a focused sct checker workflow for example.com; do not switch to a broader certificate audit unless it is required.
evals.expected_output: Use the sct-checker skill and avoid substituting adjacent skills when the user asks for this focused workflow.
expectations: Selects sct-checker instead of a generic certificate or TLS skill.
Avoids unrelated scanning, generation, or remediation steps unless requested.
States any required inputs or limitations from the skill instructions.
